title: Gold, FD, or Index Fund?
scenario: You're ready to invest ₹5,000 a month for the long term. Relatives suggest gold or a fixed deposit; a colleague suggests a low-cost index fund. Where do you start?

choices.label: Play it safe in a fixed deposit
choices.lesson: FDs are safe and predictable, but their returns often barely beat inflation — fine for short-term goals, weak for long-term growth.

choices.label: Start a low-cost index SIP
choices.lesson: For long horizons, broad low-cost index funds have historically grown faster than FDs or gold. Match the tool to the time horizon.

concept: Choosing investments for your time horizon
